summary: Phase 4 Document Upload and Extraction testing completed. All 14 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: Upload Document button on property detail page, dropzone modal with AI extraction disclaimer, extraction review flow with form fields and confidence indicators.
passed_tests: Backend: Constants endpoint returns allowed_file_types (PDF, PNG, JPG) and max_file_size (10MB)
Backend: Document upload accepts PDF files
Backend: Document upload accepts PNG images
Backend: Document upload accepts JPG images
Backend: Document upload rejects invalid file types (returns 400)
Backend: Document upload with compliance_record_id links document to record
Backend: Upload-and-extract endpoint returns document and extraction suggestions
Backend: Document download serves file correctly
Backend: Document download returns 404 for non-existent document
Backend: Document delete removes file from database and disk
Backend: Document delete returns 404 for non-existent document
Backend: Link document to compliance record works
Backend: Link document to non-existent record returns 404
Backend: Get compliance record documents returns linked documents
Frontend: Property detail page shows 'Upload Document' button with sparkle icon
Frontend: Upload Document modal opens with dropzone
Frontend: Modal shows AI extraction disclaimer ('AI-powered extraction • Results may vary • Always verify dates')
Frontend: File upload triggers extraction and shows Review & Confirm screen
Frontend: Extraction review shows form fields (Document Title, Category, Issue Date, Expiry Date, Notes)
Frontend: Extraction review shows Cancel and Create Record buttons
Frontend: DocumentList component has download, preview, delete functionality
seed_data_creation: Test documents created during testing were cleaned up automatically
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 document upload features verified: Backend supports PDF/PNG/JPG up to 10MB with upload, download, delete, and link-to-record endpoints. Upload-and-extract uses GPT-4o vision via emergentintegrations (EMERGENT_LLM_KEY configured). Frontend has Upload Document button on property detail page that opens modal with dropzone. Extraction review shows confidence badges and form fields. Email reminders still MOCKED. Existing test data: 2 properties with compliance records.

mocked_features.email_reminders: UI toggle exists with 'Coming soon' badge, preference is saved but no actual email sending

document_upload.optional_link: compliance_record_id parameter to link on upload

upload_and_extract.fallback: Filename-based category suggestion if AI extraction fails

document_delete.removes: File from disk and database record

get_record_documents.returns: List of documents linked to the record

frontend_upload_modal.trigger: Upload Document button on property detail page
frontend_upload_modal.dropzone: Accepts drag-and-drop or click to browse
frontend_upload_modal.disclaimer: AI-powered extraction • Results may vary • Always verify dates

actions: Create Record (creates compliance record and links doc)
